scenarios.description: parseInput(html, baseUri) delegates to TreeBuilder.parse and returns a Document for non-empty html and baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document has baseUri equal to the provided baseUri and contains parsed content root element
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput String overload positive

scenarios.description: parseInput(html, baseUri) throws NullPointerException when html is null
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parseInput String overload null-html

scenarios.description: parseInput(html, baseUri) throws IllegalArgumentException when baseUri is null
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O1 parseInput String overload null-baseUri

scenarios.description: parseInput(reader, baseUri) delegates to TreeBuilder.parse with custom stub and returns stub Document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the shell for baseUri "uri" with empty head/body
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput Reader overload stub-builder
TreeBuilder stub = /* stub that returns Document.createShell(baseUri) */;

scenarios.description: parseInput(reader, baseUri) propagates IOException thrown by TreeBuilder.parse
scenarios.expectedResult: throws RuntimeException with cause IOException containing message "fail"
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O2 parseInput Reader overload exception-propagation
TreeBuilder stub = /* stub that throws IOException("fail") wrapped in RuntimeException */;
throws RuntimeException matching cause IOException with message "fail";
